cases.name: direct-meta-methods-compact

methods.description: Identify structural bottleneck nodes/edges with highest path participation.
Optimize intervention allocation under a fixed budget to improve or dampen a target outcome.
Return connectivity summary between two nodes, including connected status, shortest path, longest path, and all discovered paths.
Return summary graph statistics for the synthetic demo dataset, including density, sparsity, and degree distribution summaries.
Return non-normative metadata about the synthetic demo dataset used by cap-example.
Rank edges by influence loss under edge removal, highlighting structural bottlenecks.
Propose intervention plans that can achieve a requested outcome delta with estimated impact tradeoffs.
Return a full source-target influence matrix with in/out strength summaries.
Compare two intervention plans head-to-head on outcome impact and market disruption.
Rank intervention candidates for a target outcome node by expected effect size and aggregate market impact.
Estimate intervention propagation level over the toy market graph, including affected node count, aggregate impact level, and maximum changed node.
Estimate aggregate market impact when multiple intervention nodes are changed at once, including combined affected nodes and per-intervention summaries.
Rank nodes by systemic criticality under stress propagation, including risk score, breadth, and structural indicators.
Estimate systemic risk concentration for a node under stress, combining propagation breadth, impact intensity, structural centrality, and concentration.
Return non-dominated intervention candidates on impact-vs-disruption frontier.
Return per-path contribution decomposition between source and target, including path-level effect, normalized shares, and dominant path.
Estimate graph resilience under single-node and single-edge failure stress tests.
Compare multiple intervention scenarios on outcome lift and aggregate disruption.
Simulate multi-step shock propagation from a target node with optional damping/noise.
Rank upstream source nodes by vulnerability contribution to a target node.
Return a usage-oriented catalog for all mounted CAP verbs, including examples and extension groupings.
Execute multiple embedded CAP requests through the market pipeline and return per-request stage outcomes.
Parse an embedded CAP request and return staged graph/calc/postprocess/analysis results for market nodes.
Parse an embedded CAP request and return extracted nodes plus mapped graph-computer function plan.

cases.name: direct-meta-methods-full

methods.description: Identify structural bottleneck nodes/edges with highest path participation.
Optimize intervention allocation under a fixed budget to improve or dampen a target outcome.
Return connectivity summary between two nodes, including connected status, shortest path, longest path, and all discovered paths.
Return summary graph statistics for the synthetic demo dataset, including density, sparsity, and degree distribution summaries.
Return non-normative metadata about the synthetic demo dataset used by cap-example.
Rank edges by influence loss under edge removal, highlighting structural bottlenecks.
Propose intervention plans that can achieve a requested outcome delta with estimated impact tradeoffs.
Return a full source-target influence matrix with in/out strength summaries.
Compare two intervention plans head-to-head on outcome impact and market disruption.
Rank intervention candidates for a target outcome node by expected effect size and aggregate market impact.
Estimate intervention propagation level over the toy market graph, including affected node count, aggregate impact level, and maximum changed node.
Estimate aggregate market impact when multiple intervention nodes are changed at once, including combined affected nodes and per-intervention summaries.
Rank nodes by systemic criticality under stress propagation, including risk score, breadth, and structural indicators.
Estimate systemic risk concentration for a node under stress, combining propagation breadth, impact intensity, structural centrality, and concentration.
Return non-dominated intervention candidates on impact-vs-disruption frontier.
Return per-path contribution decomposition between source and target, including path-level effect, normalized shares, and dominant path.
Estimate graph resilience under single-node and single-edge failure stress tests.
Compare multiple intervention scenarios on outcome lift and aggregate disruption.
Simulate multi-step shock propagation from a target node with optional damping/noise.
Rank upstream source nodes by vulnerability contribution to a target node.
Return a usage-oriented catalog for all mounted CAP verbs, including examples and extension groupings.
Execute multiple embedded CAP requests through the market pipeline and return per-request stage outcomes.
Parse an embedded CAP request and return staged graph/calc/postprocess/analysis results for market nodes.
Parse an embedded CAP request and return extracted nodes plus mapped graph-computer function plan.

methods.description: Identify structural bottleneck nodes/edges with highest path participation.
Optimize intervention allocation under a fixed budget to improve or dampen a target outcome.
Return connectivity summary between two nodes, including connected status, shortest path, longest path, and all discovered paths.
Return summary graph statistics for the synthetic demo dataset, including density, sparsity, and degree distribution summaries.
Return non-normative metadata about the synthetic demo dataset used by cap-example.
Rank edges by influence loss under edge removal, highlighting structural bottlenecks.
Propose intervention plans that can achieve a requested outcome delta with estimated impact tradeoffs.
Return a full source-target influence matrix with in/out strength summaries.
Compare two intervention plans head-to-head on outcome impact and market disruption.
Rank intervention candidates for a target outcome node by expected effect size and aggregate market impact.
Estimate intervention propagation level over the toy market graph, including affected node count, aggregate impact level, and maximum changed node.
Estimate aggregate market impact when multiple intervention nodes are changed at once, including combined affected nodes and per-intervention summaries.
Rank nodes by systemic criticality under stress propagation, including risk score, breadth, and structural indicators.
Estimate systemic risk concentration for a node under stress, combining propagation breadth, impact intensity, structural centrality, and concentration.
Return non-dominated intervention candidates on impact-vs-disruption frontier.
Return per-path contribution decomposition between source and target, including path-level effect, normalized shares, and dominant path.
Estimate graph resilience under single-node and single-edge failure stress tests.
Compare multiple intervention scenarios on outcome lift and aggregate disruption.
Simulate multi-step shock propagation from a target node with optional damping/noise.
Rank upstream source nodes by vulnerability contribution to a target node.
Return a usage-oriented catalog for all mounted CAP verbs, including examples and extension groupings.
Execute multiple embedded CAP requests through the market pipeline and return per-request stage outcomes.
Parse an embedded CAP request and return staged graph/calc/postprocess/analysis results for market nodes.
Parse an embedded CAP request and return extracted nodes plus mapped graph-computer function plan.
